description: SAML SSO with auto-submitting POST forms: SAMLResponse/RelayState travel via hidden inputs on bridge pages that scripts submit on load.
llmFlowNotes: SAML auto-POST bridge detected: SAMLResponse and RelayState must be CSS-extracted from the bridge page's hidden inputs (input[name="SAMLResponse"]) and posted to the ACS URL. Never assert on bridge-page text; never replay a recorded SAMLResponse — it is signed and time-boxed.
expectations: SAMLResponse/RelayState extracted from bridge hidden inputs
no text assertions on auto-submit bridge pages
